heading: Funds for incidental expenses and promotional items relating to volunteers
label: 2272a Funds for incidental expenses and promotional items relating to volunteers
text: On and after , funds appropriated to the Department of Agriculture may be used for incidental expenses such as transportation, uniforms, lodging, and subsistence for volunteers serving under the authority of , when such volunteers are engaged in the work of the United States Department of Agriculture; and for promotional items of nominal value relating to the United States Department of Agriculture Volunteer Programs.August 6, 1996section 2272 of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 2272a, , , , authorized use of funds for incidental expenses and promotional items relating to volunteers on and after , prior to repeal by , , .Pub.
